---
title: "LSA Instructions"
toc: false
---

Every digitized LSA criterion, in one table, with the instruction text transcribed
from its source page (the line just above the E/M/D patterns — e.g. "Students sing
patterns using tonal syllables"). Tonal Register Book 1 instructions come from `JRI
Tonal Register Analysis.docx`; the other three books were read directly off the
rendered PDF pages. Click a row's key to open that criterion in the
[Evaluation Chart](lsa-chart.qmd).

```{=html}
<style>
#lsa-instr-controls { margin-bottom: .75rem; display: flex; gap: .6rem; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
#lsa-instr-filter { flex: 1 1 16rem; max-width: 24rem; padding: .35rem .6rem; border: 1px solid var(--site-border); border-radius: .3rem; background: var(--site-surface); color: inherit; }
#lsa-instr-controls select { padding: .35rem .6rem; border: 1px solid var(--site-border); border-radius: .3rem; background: var(--site-surface); color: inherit; max-width: 16rem; }
#lsa-instr-count { color: var(--site-ink-2); font-size: .85rem; }
#lsa-instr table { width: 100%; }
#lsa-instr th {
  color: var(--parch-dim);
  font-weight: 600;
  border-top: 2px solid var(--parch-edge);
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  background: var(--site-surface);
}
#lsa-instr td, #lsa-instr th { vertical-align: top; }
#lsa-instr td.lsa-key, #lsa-instr th.lsa-key { white-space: nowrap; }
#lsa-instr td.lsa-count, #lsa-instr th.lsa-count { text-align: center; white-space: nowrap; }
#lsa-instr td.lsa-skill, #lsa-instr th.lsa-skill { white-space: nowrap; }
#lsa-instr a.lsa-key-link {
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--bs-link-color, #0969DA);
}
#lsa-instr a.lsa-key-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
#lsa-instr tr.lsa-hidden { display: none; }
#lsa-instr td.lsa-nolink { color: var(--site-ink-3); font-style: italic; }
</style>

<div id="lsa-instr-controls">
  <input type="text" id="lsa-instr-filter" placeholder="Filter by key, unit, or instruction text…">
  <select id="lsa-instr-skill-filter">
    <option value="">All skills</option>
  </select>
  <select id="lsa-instr-content-filter">
    <option value="">All content / context</option>
  </select>
  <span id="lsa-instr-count"></span>
</div>

<div id="lsa-instr">
  <table class="table table-sm table-hover">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th class="lsa-key">Key</th>
        <th class="lsa-count">Unit</th>
        <th>§ / Crit</th>
        <th class="lsa-count">Tonal key</th>
        <th class="lsa-skill">Skill</th>
        <th>Content / Context</th>
        <th>Instruction</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody id="lsa-instr-body"></tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<script src="/apps/patterns/pattern-object.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/rhythms/rhythm-pattern-object.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/lsa/toc.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/lsa/curriculum.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/lsa/instructions.js"></script>
<script>
(function () {
  function lsaLink(register, key) {
    return "/teacher/lsa-chart.html?register=" + register + "&criterion=" + encodeURIComponent(key);
  }

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const criteria = window.LSA_CRITERIA || [];
    const instructions = typeof LSA_INSTRUCTIONS !== "undefined" ? LSA_INSTRUCTIONS : {};
    const tbody = document.getElementById("lsa-instr-body");
    const filterInput = document.getElementById("lsa-instr-filter");
    const skillSelect = document.getElementById("lsa-instr-skill-filter");
    const contentSelect = document.getElementById("lsa-instr-content-filter");
    const countEl = document.getElementById("lsa-instr-count");

    function populateOptions(select, values) {
      const unique = Array.from(new Set(values.filter(Boolean))).sort();
      unique.forEach(function (v) {
        const opt = document.createElement("option");
        opt.value = v;
        opt.textContent = v;
        select.appendChild(opt);
      });
    }
    populateOptions(skillSelect, criteria.map(function (c) { return c.skillLabel; }));
    populateOptions(contentSelect, criteria.map(function (c) { return c.content; }));

    const rows = [];
    criteria.forEach(function (c) {
      const instruction = instructions[c.familyKey] || "";
      const tr = document.createElement("tr");
      tr.dataset.skill = c.skillLabel || "";
      tr.dataset.content = c.content || "";

      const tdKey = document.createElement("td");
      tdKey.className = "lsa-key";
      const a = document.createElement("a");
      a.className = "lsa-key-link";
      a.href = lsaLink(c.register, c.familyKey);
      a.textContent = c.familyKey;
      tdKey.appendChild(a);
      tr.appendChild(tdKey);

      const tdUnit = document.createElement("td");
      tdUnit.className = "lsa-count";
      tdUnit.textContent = String(c.unit);
      tr.appendChild(tdUnit);

      const tdSectCrit = document.createElement("td");
      tdSectCrit.textContent = "§" + c.section + " · " + c.criterion;
      tr.appendChild(tdSectCrit);

      const tdTonalKey = document.createElement("td");
      tdTonalKey.className = "lsa-count";
      if (c.register === "tonal") {
        tdTonalKey.textContent = c.key || "—";
        if (!c.key) tdTonalKey.className += " lsa-nolink";
      } else {
        tdTonalKey.className += " lsa-nolink";
        tdTonalKey.textContent = "N/A";
      }
      tr.appendChild(tdTonalKey);

      const tdSkill = document.createElement("td");
      tdSkill.className = "lsa-skill";
      if (c.skill) {
        tdSkill.textContent = c.skill;
        tdSkill.title = c.skillLabel;
      } else {
        tdSkill.className += " lsa-nolink";
        tdSkill.textContent = "—";
      }
      tr.appendChild(tdSkill);

      const tdContent = document.createElement("td");
      if (c.content) {
        tdContent.textContent = c.content;
      } else {
        tdContent.className = "lsa-nolink";
        tdContent.textContent = "—";
      }
      tr.appendChild(tdContent);

      const tdInstr = document.createElement("td");
      if (instruction) {
        tdInstr.textContent = instruction;
      } else {
        tdInstr.className = "lsa-nolink";
        tdInstr.textContent = "not yet transcribed";
      }
      tr.appendChild(tdInstr);

      const searchText = (c.familyKey + " " + c.unit + " " + c.section + " " + c.criterion + " " +
        (c.key || "") + " " + (c.skillLabel || "") + " " + (c.content || "") + " " + instruction).toLowerCase();
      tr.dataset.search = searchText;

      tbody.appendChild(tr);
      rows.push(tr);
    });

    function applyFilter() {
      const q = filterInput.value.trim().toLowerCase();
      const skill = skillSelect.value;
      const content = contentSelect.value;
      let shown = 0;
      rows.forEach(function (tr) {
        const match = (!q || tr.dataset.search.indexOf(q) !== -1) &&
          (!skill || tr.dataset.skill === skill) &&
          (!content || tr.dataset.content === content);
        tr.classList.toggle("lsa-hidden", !match);
        if (match) shown++;
      });
      countEl.textContent = shown + " of " + rows.length + " criteria";
    }

    filterInput.addEventListener("input", applyFilter);
    skillSelect.addEventListener("change", applyFilter);
    contentSelect.addEventListener("change", applyFilter);
    applyFilter();
  });
})();
</script>
```
